name: Impossible Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a 10 x 1 1/2" pie plate.
3. In a bowl, beat all ingredients except the cherry pie filling and Streusel until smooth (15 seconds in a blender on high or 1 minute with a hand mixer).
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pie plate.
5. Spoon the cherry pie filling evenly over the top of the batter.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the Streusel topping over the hot filling and bake until the streusel is brown, about 10 minutes longer.
8. Let cool before refrigerating any remaining pie.
Streusel:
1. Cut the cooled Margarine into pieces.
2. Mix equal parts Bisquick, Brown sugar, and Cinnamon in a bowl until crumbly.
